title: dysoxylum procerum
intro: Dysoxylum procerum, also known as Philippine white ebony, is a plant species native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. It has various health benefits, including its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Dysoxylum procerum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are typically consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
